active_work.text: Mission-control metrics remain 25/68 verified, 1 active, 0 blocked, and 1 deferred. Direct DRM.jl smoke evidence is banked on DRM.jl main, and the Julia-via-R clean-main bridge audit removed stale local DRM.jl and Julia-home defaults from live bridge tests. `devtools::test(filter = "julia")` passed against the clean merged DRM.jl main worktree with the known Route A skip. No bridge row is promoted: plain non-phylo binomial, q4/q8 bridge parity, release, CRAN, recovery, coverage, power, and selectable engine_control claims remain separate gates.
